data.title: Dimensional Entities Drops Below Substantial Holding Threshold in Sandfire Resources
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Sandfire Resources Limited ( (AU:SFR) ) is now available.

Sandfire Resources Limited has disclosed that Dimensional Entities has ceased to be a substantial shareholder in the company as of 21 January 2026, according to a statutory notice filed under the Corporations Act. The change reflects a reduction in Dimensional’s relevant interest in Sandfire’s voting securities below the substantial holding threshold, a move that may indicate portfolio rebalancing or altered institutional appetite for exposure to the miner, and could be closely watched by other investors as a gauge of shifting support among major shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:SFR) stock is a Buy with a A$22.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sandfire Resources Limited stock, see the AU:SFR Stock Forecast page.

More about Sandfire Resources Limited

Sandfire Resources Limited is an Australian-listed resources company active in the mining and exploration sector, with a focus on base metals such as copper and associated minerals. The company operates in a capital-intensive industry where changes in substantial shareholdings can signal shifts in institutional investor sentiment and influence market perceptions of its long-term prospects.

Average Trading Volume: 1,606,635

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$8.75B

data.title: SSH Group Lifts Half-Year Revenue 25% as Gold Mining Push Accelerates
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from SSH Group Ltd. ( (AU:SSH) ).

SSH Group Ltd reported a strong first half for FY26, with revenue rising 25% year-on-year to $24.1 million, EBITDA reaching $3.9 million and an EBITDA CAGR of about 70% since H1 FY23, supported by improved fleet and workforce utilisation. The company ended the period with $6.65 million in cash, net assets of $13.6 million and a $3.1 million reduction in hire purchase debt, reflecting disciplined capital management. Operationally, SSH accelerated its shift toward mining, advancing several gold projects toward near-term production through drilling, technical studies and early works, including high-grade RC drilling at Wagtail that confirmed strong continuity and coarse-gold mineralisation. The half also saw a $2.53 million strategic placement to Xinhai Mining Services, forming an alliance that enhances SSH’s access to global mining and processing expertise, and the appointment of mining industry veteran Kevin Malaxos as a non-executive director, collectively strengthening its financial footing, project pipeline and industry positioning as it enters the second half of FY26.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:SSH) stock is a Hold with a A$0.20 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SSH Group Ltd. stock, see the AU:SSH Stock Forecast page.

More about SSH Group Ltd.

SSH Group Ltd is an Australian-listed company transitioning into a mine development and operating platform, with a strategic focus on gold mining and mine development under its Hire | Mine | Own strategy. The group provides integrated mining services spanning drilling, technical studies, early works and project development, positioning itself as both an operator and long-term development partner across its gold project portfolio.

Average Trading Volume: 97,152

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$19.62M

See more insights into SSH stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An update from Lulu’s Fashion Lounge Holdings ( (LVLU) ) is now available.

On January 22, 2026, Lulu’s Fashion Lounge Holdings, Inc. amended its consulting arrangement with Business Talent Group, LLC to extend the engagement of Heidi Crane as the company’s fractional Chief Financial Officer. Under the amendment, Crane, who remains employed by BTG, will continue providing CFO services from January 23, 2026 until the completion of Milestone 2, expected around February 23, 2026, with the option for further extension by mutual agreement, and Lulu’s will pay BTG $63,000 for her services during this period, signaling the company’s decision to maintain interim financial leadership through a fractional CFO structure.

The most recent analyst rating on (LVLU) stock is a Sell with a $19.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lulu’s Fashion Lounge Holdings stock, see the LVLU Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on LVLU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LVLU is a Neutral.

Overall score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (declining revenue, ongoing losses, high leverage, and cash flow strain). Technicals are strong with price far above moving averages, but extremely overbought momentum raises near-term risk. Earnings call commentary shows operational improvements (margin and cost reductions) but demand and cash flow remain key challenges; valuation offers limited support due to negative earnings and no dividend data.

To see Spark’s full report on LVLU stock, click here.

More about Lulu’s Fashion Lounge Holdings

Lulu’s Fashion Lounge Holdings, Inc. operates in the fashion and apparel industry, offering women’s clothing and related products, with a focus on contemporary, trend-driven styles sold through its retail channels.

data.title: SouthState Corporation Reports Strong Q4 Results, Boosts Shareholder Returns
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

SouthState Corporation ( (SSB) ) has issued an update.

On January 22, 2026, SouthState Bank Corporation reported unaudited results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025, highlighting strong profitability and balance sheet growth. Fourth-quarter diluted earnings per share rose 32% year over year to $2.46 (adjusted $2.47), net income reached $247.7 million, and returns on average assets and tangible common equity were 1.47% and 19.1%, respectively. Loans and deposits each grew at an 8% annualized rate in the quarter, while tangible book value per share increased 10% from a year earlier despite a higher dividend and repurchase of 2.4% of outstanding shares. Net interest income slipped 3% from the prior quarter to $581 million amid a modest decline in loan yields, but noninterest income improved, credit costs remained low with net charge-offs at 0.09% of average loans, and capital ratios stayed strong. Reflecting confidence in its performance and capital strength, the board on January 21, 2026 authorized a new stock repurchase plan for up to 5.56 million shares, replacing a prior, smaller authorization, and declared a first-quarter 2026 cash dividend of $0.60 per share, payable February 13, 2026 to shareholders of record on February 6, 2026, further signaling ongoing commitment to shareholder returns.

The most recent analyst rating on (SSB) stock is a Buy with a $112.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SouthState Corporation stock, see the SSB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SSB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SSB is a Outperform.

SouthState Corporation’s strong financial performance and positive earnings call are the most significant factors driving the score. The stock’s reasonable valuation and technical indicators support a stable outlook, though rising deposit costs and a large loan charge-off present minor risks.

To see Spark’s full report on SSB stock, click here.

More about SouthState Corporation

SouthState Bank Corporation, headquartered in Winter Haven, Florida and listed on the NYSE under ticker SSB, operates as a regional banking company offering loans, deposit products, and related financial services, including correspondent banking and capital markets activities, with a focus on generating strong returns and maintaining a solid capital position following its Independent Financial acquisition.

Average Trading Volume: 793,153

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $9.74B

EROAD ( (ERDLF) ) has provided an update.

UBS Group AG and related entities have disclosed a 5.02% substantial shareholding in EROAD Limited, holding 9,431,807 ordinary shares out of 187,966,817 on issue. data.title: Tactical Resources Raises $1.31 Million in Private Placement Financing
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Tactical Resources Corp. ( (TSE:RARE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Tactical Resources Corp. has closed a non-brokered private placement, issuing 207,625 common shares at $6.30 per share for gross proceeds of approximately $1.31 million, with the securities subject to a four-month hold period and the offering still requiring final TSX Venture Exchange approval. The company plans to use the net proceeds for working capital and general corporate purposes, while paying a 10% cash finder’s fee on the financing, bolstering its balance sheet to support ongoing operations and its strategic focus on rare earth exploration and processing technology development in North American supply chains.

More about Tactical Resources Corp.

Tactical Resources Corp. is a mineral exploration and development company focused on U.S.-made rare earth elements used in semiconductors, electric vehicles, advanced robotics and national defense, and is also working on innovative metallurgical processing techniques to enhance rare earth element development potential.

data.title: NZ Super Fund Lifts Stake in Sky Network Television to 8.65%
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

SKY Network Television ( (SYKWF) ) has shared an announcement.

The New Zealand Superannuation Fund, through New Zealand Superannuation Fund Nominees Limited, has increased its substantial shareholding in Sky Network Television to 11,906,769 ordinary shares, representing 8.648% of the company’s issued voting capital, up from 7.373% at its last disclosure in July 2025. The change results from net on-market purchases between July 2025 and 20 January 2026, during which the fund bought 2,090,586 shares and sold 334,342 shares, signalling a strengthened institutional position in Sky Network Television and potentially reflecting increased confidence in the broadcaster’s outlook and strategic direction.

More about SKY Network Television

Sky Network Television is a New Zealand-based pay-television and broadcasting company that provides subscription TV services, streaming platforms and related media content to domestic audiences. It operates in the media and entertainment sector, focusing on delivering sports, movies, and general entertainment channels to households and businesses across New Zealand.

For an in-depth examination of SYKWF stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Pryme Raises NOK 6 Million in Subsequent Share Offering
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Pryme B.V. ( (DE:8XG0) ) has provided an announcement.

Pryme N.V. has completed its subsequent offering of new shares, receiving subscriptions for 1,522,998 shares and allocating 1,500,708 shares at NOK 4.00 each, raising gross proceeds of NOK 6.0 million (around EUR 518,000). The capital increase tied to the offering is expected to be registered in late January, with delivery of the new shares to investors’ VPS accounts shortly thereafter, providing the Rotterdam‑based plastics recycler with fresh funding to support its operations and growth plans, while DNB Bank ASA acted as settlement and receiving agent and Advokatfirmaet Schjødt AS served as legal adviser.

More about Pryme B.V.

Pryme N.V. is a cleantech company that converts plastic waste into pyrolysis oil through large-scale chemical recycling, using proprietary enhancements to a proven process. The company has begun production at its first plant in the port of Rotterdam, designed to handle about 26,000 tonnes of plastic waste annually, and aims to build a portfolio of owned and operated plants with strategic partners to support a low‑carbon circular plastics economy; its shares are listed on Euronext Growth Oslo.

Average Trading Volume: 4,378

Current Market Cap: NOK188.2M

data.title: Sotherly Hotels Shareholders Approve Buyout and Go-Private Deal
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Sotherly Hotels ( (SOHO) ) has issued an update.

On January 22, 2026, Sotherly Hotels Inc. shareholders approved the merger of the company with an acquisition vehicle of KW Kingfisher LLC, a joint venture led by affiliates of Kemmons Wilson Hospitality Partners LP with Ascendant Capital Partners LP as strategic partner, in a special meeting where approximately 58.7% of outstanding shares were represented, and also endorsed on an advisory basis the compensation arrangements for named executive officers tied to the deal. The transaction, which remains subject to closing conditions and is expected to close in the first quarter of 2026, will see the joint venture acquire all outstanding Sotherly common shares for $2.25 per share in cash, positioning the lodging REIT for a transition to private ownership and delivering a defined cash exit for its stockholders while potentially altering its future capital structure and strategic direction.

The most recent analyst rating on (SOHO) stock is a Hold with a $2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sotherly Hotels stock, see the SOHO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SOHO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SOHO is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (TTM revenue softness, slight net loss, and leverage-related risk) and negative corporate events (default notice and preferred dividend deferrals). Technicals are moderately supportive with improving longer-term trend and neutral-to-positive momentum, but valuation remains challenged due to the negative P/E and lack of dividend yield support.

To see Spark’s full report on SOHO stock, click here.

More about Sotherly Hotels

Sotherly Hotels Inc. (Nasdaq: SOHO) is a self-managed, self-administered lodging real estate investment trust focused on owning, acquiring, renovating and repositioning full-service, primarily upscale and upper-upscale hotel properties in primary markets across the mid-Atlantic and southern United States. The company’s portfolio comprises ten full-service hotels in seven states totaling 2,786 rooms, along with interests in two condominium hotels and their associated rental programs.

Average Trading Volume: 359,201

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $44.53M

Gold Digger Resources Inc ( (TSE:NUKV) ) has issued an update.

Nuclear Vision Limited has upsized its previously announced private placement to as much as 24 million units at $0.25 per unit, increasing the potential gross proceeds to $6 million in response to strong investor demand. Each unit comprises one common share and a half warrant, with the warrants exercisable at tiered prices over 24 months, and the company plans to deploy the net proceeds primarily to advance its Svabovce and Michalova manganese projects in Slovakia and for general working capital, a move that strengthens its funding base for critical mineral development within its broader energy transition strategy.

Nuclear Vision Ltd. is an energy transition-focused exploration and development company with a diversified portfolio of uranium and critical mineral assets in stable, mining-friendly jurisdictions. Its strategy centers on identifying underdeveloped assets with strong fundamentals, advancing them through disciplined technical programs, and creating long-term value through responsible project development.
